title: G Block Dwellers Server
description: The G Block Dwellers Server is a small server for a group of friends. Uploaded for ease of updating.
body:
The G Block Dwellers Server is a small server for a group of friends. Uploaded for ease of updating.

Contains Create Mod, Ars Nouveau, Packed Up, multiple storage mods, among others. Has a variety of mods that can enchance your modded experience, while being able to run in regular computers.

GraveStone Mod by henkelmax: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod
